verses.3: Inna jaAAalnahu quranan AAarabiyyan laAAallakum taAAqiloona
verses.4: Wainnahu fee ommi alkitabi ladayna laAAaliyyun hakeemun
verses.5: Afanadribu AAankumu alththikra safhan an kuntum qawman musrifeena
verses.6: Wakam arsalna min nabiyyin fee alawwaleena
verses.7: Wama yateehim min nabiyyin illa kanoo bihi yastahzioona
verses.8: Faahlakna ashadda minhum batshan wamada mathalu alawwaleena
verses.9: Walain saaltahum man khalaqa alssamawati waalarda layaqoolunna khalaqahunna alAAazeezu alAAaleemu
verses.10: Allathee jaAAala lakumu alarda mahdan wajaAAala lakum feeha subulan laAAallakum tahtadoona
verses.11: Waallathee nazzala mina alssamai maan biqadarin faansharna bihi baldatan maytan kathalika tukhrajoona
verses.12: Waallathee khalaqa alazwaja kullaha wajaAAala lakum mina alfulki waalanAAami ma tarkaboona
verses.13: Litastawoo AAala thuhoorihi thumma tathkuroo niAAmata rabbikum itha istawaytum AAalayhi wataqooloo subhana allathee sakhkhara lana hatha wama kunna lahu muqrineena
verses.15: WajaAAaloo lahu min AAibadihi juzan inna alinsana lakafoorun mubeenun
verses.16: Ami ittakhatha mimma yakhluqu banatin waasfakum bialbaneena
verses.17: Waitha bushshira ahaduhum bima daraba lilrrahmani mathalan thalla wajhuhu muswaddan wahuwa katheemun
verses.18: Awaman yunashshao fee alhilyati wahuwa fee alkhisami ghayru mubeenin
verses.19: WajaAAaloo almalaikata allatheena hum AAibadu alrrahmani inathan ashahidoo khalqahum satuktabu shahadatuhum wayusaloona
verses.20: Waqaloo law shaa alrrahmanu ma AAabadnahum ma lahum bithalika min AAilmin in hum illa yakhrusoona
verses.21: Am ataynahum kitaban min qablihi fahum bihi mustamsikoona
verses.22: Bal qaloo inna wajadna abaana AAala ommatin wainna AAala atharihim muhtadoona
verses.23: Wakathalika ma arsalna min qablika fee qaryatin min natheerin illa qala mutrafooha inna wajadna abaana AAala ommatin wainna AAala atharihim muqtadoona
verses.24: Qala awalaw jitukum biahda mimma wajadtum AAalayhi abaakum qaloo inna bima orsiltum bihi kafiroona
verses.25: Faintaqamna minhum faonthur kayfa kana AAaqibatu almukaththibeena
verses.26: Waith qala ibraheemu liabeehi waqawmihi innanee baraon mimma taAAbudoona
verses.28: WajaAAalaha kalimatan baqiyatan fee AAaqibihi laAAallahum yarjiAAoona
verses.29: Bal mattaAAtu haolai waabaahum hatta jaahumu alhaqqu warasoolun mubeenun
verses.30: Walamma jaahumu alhaqqu qaloo hatha sihrun wainna bihi kafiroona
verses.31: Waqaloo lawla nuzzila hatha alquranu AAala rajulin mina alqaryatayni AAatheemun
verses.32: Ahum yaqsimoona rahmata rabbika nahnu qasamna baynahum maAAeeshatahum fee alhayati alddunya warafaAAna baAAdahum fawqa baAAdin darajatin liyattakhitha baAAduhum baAAdan sukhriyyan warahmatu rabbika khayrun mimma yajmaAAoona
verses.33: Walawla an yakoona alnnasu ommatan wahidatan lajaAAalna liman yakfuru bialrrahmani libuyootihim suqufan min fiddatin wamaAAarija AAalayha yathharoona
verses.35: Wazukhrufan wain kullu thalika lamma mataAAu alhayati alddunya waalakhiratu AAinda rabbika lilmuttaqeena
verses.36: Waman yaAAshu AAan thikri alrrahmani nuqayyid lahu shaytanan fahuwa lahu qareenun
verses.37: Wainnahum layasuddoonahum AAani alssabeeli wayahsaboona annahum muhtadoona
verses.38: Hatta itha jaana qala ya layta baynee wabaynaka buAAda almashriqayni fabisa alqareenu
verses.39: Walan yanfaAAakumu alyawma ith thalamtum annakum fee alAAathabi mushtarikoona
verses.40: Afaanta tusmiAAu alssumma aw tahdee alAAumya waman kana fee dalalin mubeenin
verses.41: Faimma nathhabanna bika fainna minhum muntaqimoona
verses.42: Aw nuriyannaka allathee waAAadnahum fainna AAalayhim muqtadiroona
verses.43: Faistamsik biallathee oohiya ilayka innaka AAala siratin mustaqeemin
verses.44: Wainnahu lathikrun laka waliqawmika wasawfa tusaloona
verses.45: Waisal man arsalna min qablika min rusulina ajaAAalna min dooni alrrahmani alihatan yuAAbadoona
verses.46: Walaqad arsalna moosa biayatina ila firAAawna wamalaihi faqala innee rasoolu rabbi alAAalameena
verses.47: Falamma jaahum biayatina itha hum minha yadhakoona
verses.48: Wama nureehim min ayatin illa hiya akbaru min okhtiha waakhathnahum bialAAathabi laAAallahum yarjiAAoona
verses.49: Waqaloo ya ayyuha alsahiru odAAu lana rabbaka bima AAahida AAindaka innana lamuhtadoona
verses.50: Falamma kashafna AAanhumu alAAathaba itha hum yankuthoona
verses.51: Wanada firAAawnu fee qawmihi qala ya qawmi alaysa lee mulku misra wahathihi alanharu tajree min tahtee afala tubsiroona
verses.52: Am ana khayrun min hatha allathee huwa maheenun wala yakadu yubeenu
verses.53: Falawla olqiya AAalayhi aswiratun min thahabin aw jaa maAAahu almalaikatu muqtarineena
verses.54: Faistakhaffa qawmahu faataAAoohu innahum kanoo qawman fasiqeena
verses.55: Falamma asafoona intaqamna minhum faaghraqnahum ajmaAAeena
verses.57: Walamma duriba ibnu maryama mathalan itha qawmuka minhu yasiddoona
verses.58: Waqaloo aalihatuna khayrun am huwa ma daraboohu laka illa jadalan bal hum qawmun khasimoona
verses.59: In huwa illa AAabdun anAAamna AAalayhi wajaAAalnahu mathalan libanee israeela
verses.60: Walaw nashao lajaAAalna minkum malaikatan fee alardi yakhlufoona
verses.61: Wainnahu laAAilmun lilssaAAati fala tamtarunna biha waittabiAAooni hatha siratun mustaqeemun
verses.62: Wala yasuddannakumu alshshaytanu innahu lakum AAaduwwun mubeenun
verses.63: Walamma jaa AAeesa bialbayyinati qala qad jitukum bialhikmati waliobayyina lakum baAAda allathee takhtalifoona feehi faittaqoo Allaha waateeAAooni
verses.64: Inna Allaha huwa rabbee warabbukum faoAAbudoohu hatha siratun mustaqeemun
verses.65: Faikhtalafa alahzabu min baynihim fawaylun lillatheena thalamoo min AAathabi yawmin aleemin
verses.66: Hal yanthuroona illa alssaAAata an tatiyahum baghtatan wahum la yashAAuroona
verses.67: Alakhillao yawmaithin baAAduhum libaAAdin AAaduwwun illa almuttaqeena
verses.68: Ya AAibadi la khawfun AAalaykumu alyawma wala antum tahzanoona
verses.71: Yutafu AAalayhim bisihafin min thahabin waakwabin wafeeha ma tashtaheehi alanfusu watalaththu alaAAyunu waantum feeha khalidoona
verses.72: Watilka aljannatu allatee oorithtumooha bima kuntum taAAmaloona
verses.73: Lakum feeha fakihatun katheeratun minha takuloona
verses.74: Inna almujrimeena fee AAathabi jahannama khalidoona
verses.75: La yufattaru AAanhum wahum feehi mublisoona
verses.76: Wama thalamnahum walakin kanoo humu alththalimeena
verses.77: Wanadaw ya maliku liyaqdi AAalayna rabbuka qala innakum makithoona
verses.78: Laqad jinakum bialhaqqi walakinna aktharakum lilhaqqi karihoona
verses.80: Am yahsaboona anna la nasmaAAu sirrahum wanajwahum bala warusuluna ladayhim yaktuboona
verses.81: Qul in kana lilrrahmani waladun faana awwalu alAAabideena
verses.82: Subhana rabbi alssamawati waalardi rabbi alAAarshi AAamma yasifoona
verses.83: Fatharhum yakhoodoo wayalAAaboo hatta yulaqoo yawmahumu allathee yooAAadoona
verses.84: Wahuwa allathee fee alssamai ilahun wafee alardi ilahun wahuwa alhakeemu alAAaleemu
verses.85: Watabaraka allathee lahu mulku alssamawati waalardi wama baynahuma waAAindahu AAilmu alssaAAati wailayhi turjaAAoona
verses.86: Wala yamliku allatheena yadAAoona min doonihi alshshafaAAata illa man shahida bialhaqqi wahum yaAAlamoona
verses.87: Walain saaltahum man khalaqahum layaqoolunna Allahu faanna yufakoona
verses.88: Waqeelihi yarabbi inna haolai qawmun la yuminoona
verses.89: Faisfah AAanhum waqul salamun fasawfa yaAAlamoona
